hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings=0 2>/dev/null; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q '^components/'; then comp=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|components/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|'); testfile="tests/components/${comp}.test.tsx"; if [ -f "$testfile" ]; then npm test "$testfile" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; } || true
